extracted_claims: Announcement effects are strongest when the surprise component is large.
18292712-9fd7-473c-ba0a-bb6e682a17dc.methodology_summary: Event-study style measurement around announcement dates.
18292712-9fd7-473c-ba0a-bb6e682a17dc.relevance_to_hypothesis: Relevant if the hypothesis is framed around CPI prints, labor releases, or other event windows.
18292712-9fd7-473c-ba0a-bb6e682a17dc.summary: Event-style reactions to macro releases exist, but persistence and sign can vary with the prevailing regime and expectations backdrop.
18292712-9fd7-473c-ba0a-bb6e682a17dc.title: Macro announcement effects are short horizon and noisy across regimes

extracted_claims: Real-rate moves can affect valuation-sensitive sectors more than the broad market.
4ef52d0e-7f6b-4400-9eff-566edd9add65.methodology_summary: Empirical macro-finance framing using historical yield and asset-return relationships.
4ef52d0e-7f6b-4400-9eff-566edd9add65.relevance_to_hypothesis: Directly relevant to Investigate semis versus defensives..
4ef52d0e-7f6b-4400-9eff-566edd9add65.summary: Falling real yields tend to support duration-sensitive equity segments, though the effect is regime-dependent.
4ef52d0e-7f6b-4400-9eff-566edd9add65.title: Real-rate sensitivity of long-duration assets

extracted_claims: Macro interpretation matters as much as the raw data direction.
6b143f62-f484-4fb0-82c0-095fc88bb815.methodology_summary: Cross-market commentary supported by historical sector-relative performance comparisons.
6b143f62-f484-4fb0-82c0-095fc88bb815.relevance_to_hypothesis: Useful counterweight because it highlights conditional interpretation rather than a one-way macro rule.
6b143f62-f484-4fb0-82c0-095fc88bb815.source: Sell-side or public market strategy research
6b143f62-f484-4fb0-82c0-095fc88bb815.summary: Cooling inflation alone is often insufficient; growth-sensitive outperformance depends on whether the market reads the move as benign easing rather than growth deterioration.
6b143f62-f484-4fb0-82c0-095fc88bb815.title: Sector rotation depends on growth expectations as well as inflation cooling

02391cc7-cf6c-4e0a-a588-916c3ecb72c9.expected_direction: direction depends on the sign of the macro move, but should be stable in the proposed specification
02391cc7-cf6c-4e0a-a588-916c3ecb72c9.label: primary
02391cc7-cf6c-4e0a-a588-916c3ecb72c9.mechanism: Changes in macro expectations alter discount rates and sector-relative earnings expectations.
02391cc7-cf6c-4e0a-a588-916c3ecb72c9.novelty_usefulness_note: Good default card for a first-pass quant investigation.
02391cc7-cf6c-4e0a-a588-916c3ecb72c9.thesis: Investigate semis versus defensives. through a measurable macro-to-market transmission channel.
02391cc7-cf6c-4e0a-a588-916c3ecb72c9.title: Primary macro transmission

27566fd9-8a80-4bfb-a9d5-fffdc8e51095.expected_direction: defensives outperform when the macro signal is interpreted as growth-negative
27566fd9-8a80-4bfb-a9d5-fffdc8e51095.label: counterfactual
27566fd9-8a80-4bfb-a9d5-fffdc8e51095.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.
27566fd9-8a80-4bfb-a9d5-fffdc8e51095.novelty_usefulness_note: Useful falsification card that forces clearer interpretation.
27566fd9-8a80-4bfb-a9d5-fffdc8e51095.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
27566fd9-8a80-4bfb-a9d5-fffdc8e51095.title: Counterfactual defensive rotation

932e3bcc-0ec5-4215-b60f-5be61d846ca1.expected_direction: stronger and cleaner directional effect within selected regimes
932e3bcc-0ec5-4215-b60f-5be61d846ca1.label: regime
932e3bcc-0ec5-4215-b60f-5be61d846ca1.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
932e3bcc-0ec5-4215-b60f-5be61d846ca1.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
932e3bcc-0ec5-4215-b60f-5be61d846ca1.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
932e3bcc-0ec5-4215-b60f-5be61d846ca1.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity
